requester.requester_label: AI patch planner requested authority to apply the reviewed patch.

authority_owner.source_label: Shell-owned AI apply review surface; the model cannot grant itself authority.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: No policy lock blocks this local patch; user choice controls whether apply proceeds.

target_scope.target_label: Current root only; no provider, remote host, or full-workspace widening.
target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: Decision is for this patch apply only and is not remembered.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: No active grant remains after denial; prompt trace stays in local evidence history.

capability_groups.purpose_label: Update import paths and one test expectation from the reviewed diff.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Write three files in the current root.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Commit the patch body already visible in review.

prompt_questions.what_is_requested: Apply a reviewed AI-generated patch to three files in the current root.
prompt_questions.why_needed: The AI tool cannot write files without a shell-issued authority ticket.
prompt_questions.changes_if_allowed: The patch applies to the current root and creates a local checkpoint before write.
prompt_questions.works_if_denied: Open buffers, local edits, search, and the reviewed patch draft remain available.
prompt_questions.grant_scope_statement: Grant is once-only for this patch apply and expires if the basis changes.
prompt_questions.authority_owner_statement: The shell owns the decision; the AI tool is only the requester.
prompt_questions.revocation_route: No durable grant is created; local evidence history records the denied prompt.

side_effect_envelope.effect_summary: Writes a reviewed patch to three files after creating a checkpoint.

consequence_blocks.outcome_label: Reviewed patch writes to current root
consequence_blocks.description: A checkpoint is created, then the reviewed patch writes three local files.

consequence_blocks.outcome_label: Local work continues with draft patch
consequence_blocks.description: The patch stays as a local draft; open buffers, search, and manual editing continue.

decision_actions.label: Apply reviewed patch to current root

denial_or_degrade.deny_path_behavior_label: Denied apply keeps the patch draft and preserves all local work.
denial_or_degrade.recovery_or_escalation_action: Reopen the diff review to request a new once-only apply ticket.
